title_en: 7. Allâh will reward those who have patience with a threefold reward: blessings, mercy
title_id: 7. Allah akan memberi pahala orang-orang yang sabar dengan pahala tiga kali lipat: berkah, rahmat
content_en: and guidance: "…but give glad tidings to those who patiently persevere – who say, when afflicted with calamity: 'To Allâh we belong, and to Him is our return' – they are those on whom (descend) blessings from their Lord, and Mercy and they are the ones that receive guidance" (al-Baqarah 2:155-7). When people came to offer their condolences to one of the salaf, for some calamity that had befallen him, he said: "Why should I not practice patience, when Allâh has promised those who have patience three rewards, each of which is better than this world and everything in it?"
content_id: dan petunjuk: "…dan sampaikanlah kabar gembira kepada orang-orang yang sabar — (yaitu) orang-orang yang apabila ditimpa musibah, mereka berkata 'Innā lillāhi wa innā ilayhi rāji'ūn' (sesungguhnya kami milik Allah dan kepada-Nyalah kami kembali) — mereka itulah yang memperoleh ampunan dan rahmat dari Tuhan mereka, dan mereka itulah orang-orang yang mendapat petunjuk" (al-Baqarah 2:155-157). Ketika orang-orang datang untuk menyampaikan belasungkawa kepada salah satu ulama salaf, atas suatu musibah yang menimpanya, ia berkata: "Mengapa aku tidak berlatih sabar, ketika Allah telah menjanjikan kepada orang-orang yang sabar tiga pahala, yang masing-masingnya lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya?"
content_ar: and الهداية: "…but give glad tidings to those who patiently persevere – who say, عندما afflicted with calamity: 'To Allâh we belong, and to Him is our return' – they are those on whom (descend) البركات from their Lord, and الرحمة and they are the ones that receive الهداية" (al-Baqarah 2:155-7). عندما people came to offer their condolences to one of the السلف, for some calamity that had befallen him, قال: "Why should I not practice الصبر, عندما Allâh has promised those who have الصبر three rewards, each of which is better than this الدنيا and everything in it?"
